span.p:
Prompt for
llm.runner
write via config set

div.style: color: rgb(230, 81, 0) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(49, 27, 146) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
CLI skips runner calls
Claude Code skill may still use
host LLM for skill-only language work

div.style: color: rgb(49, 27, 146) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
CLI uses configured runner
Claude Code skill defers to
runner-produced output
